studio.name: AI Systems Studio
studio.tagline: Exploring what one person plus a team of agents can actually build.

projects.name: Weight Tracker
projects.pitch: Private two-person WhatsApp health tracker — Gemini Flash parses messages, Supabase stores logs, a public-by-slug dashboard shows progress, and Vercel Cron sends morning/midday/evening nudges.

projects.name: Macfire Scout
projects.pitch: AI lead scout for Scottish fire safety — pulls newly registered companies from Companies House daily, scores and enriches them with director history and Google Places signals, drafts personalised outreach, and logs everything to Notion.

projects.name: CPI Engine
projects.pitch: Sector-agnostic commercial premises intelligence — identifies and qualifies commercial property opportunities across any vertical (not just fire suppression) using public, compliant data signals.

projects.name: AI Systems Studio Template
projects.pitch: Reusable, agent-driven repository template that standardizes how every studio project is planned, documented, and showcased.
